title: D2PLAN: Dual-agent Dynamic Global Planning for Retrieval-Augmented Reasoning

defines.name: D2PLAN
defines.definition: A dual-agent dynamic global planning paradigm for retrieval-augmented reasoning that coordinates a Reasoner and a Purifier to support adaptive search and robust evidence filtering.

problem: Search-augmented LLMs often fail on complex multi-hop reasoning because they construct ineffective search chains and are misled by irrelevant retrieved evidence.
